endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/scaleUnits/{scaleUnit}/storageSubSystems/{storageSubSystem}/drives
endpoints.description: Returns a list of all storage drives at a location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGESUBSYSTEM}} with a real storagesubsystem. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCALEUNIT}} with a real scaleunit.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Fabric.Admin/fabricLocations/{location}/scaleUnits/{scaleUnit}/storageSubSystems/{storageSubSystem}/drives/{drive}
endpoints.description: Return the requested a storage drive.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{STORAGESUBSYSTEM}} with a real storagesubsystem. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SCALEUNIT}} with a real scaleunit. Replace {{DRIVE}} with a real drive.
